integration_patterns.title: RestFast ETL Connector with Dynamic Variables
integration_patterns.description: Automated ETL connector that integrates RestFast with a control table to execute REST API requests with dynamic date variables for incremental and full loads
integration_patterns.use_case: Load data from external REST APIs to OneStream custom tables with automatic date range management
integration_patterns.code:
Public Shared Function ExecuteRestFastRequest(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As String
    Try
        BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[INFO] Starting RestFast request: {requestName}")
        
        ' Get RestFast utilities
        Dim utils As New Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Utils()
        
        ' Query control table for configuration
        Dim query As String = $"SELECT EndPoint, TargetTable, ReferenceDate, ReferenceColumn, Enable 
                                FROM XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL 
                                WHERE EndPoint = '{requestName}' AND Enable = 1"
        
        Dim dt As DataTable = BRApi.Database.ExecuteActionQuery(si, query, False)
        
        If dt.Rows.Count = 0 Then
            Throw New Exception($"No active configuration found for request: {requestName}")
        End If
        
        Dim row As DataRow = dt.Rows(0)
        Dim targetTable As String = row("TargetTable").ToString()
        Dim fromDate As String = row("ReferenceDate").ToString()
        Dim referenceColumn As String = row("ReferenceColumn").ToString()
        Dim toDate As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
        
        ' Default fromDate if empty (beginning of current month)
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(fromDate) Then
            fromDate = New DateTime(DateTime.Now.Year, DateTime.Now.Month, 1).ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
            BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[INFO] ReferenceDate was empty, using default: {fromDate}")
        End If
        
        ' Get saved request from RestFast
        Dim request As Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes.RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, requestName)
        
        If request Is Nothing Then
            Throw New Exception($"RestFast request '{requestName}' not found")
        End If
        
        ' Set target table
        request.tableToPopulate = targetTable
        
        ' Build custom variables dictionary
        Dim customVars As New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
        
        ' Add from/to variables based on configuration
        If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(referenceColumn) Then
            ' Incremental load
            customVars("from") = fromDate
            customVars("to") = toDate
            BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[INFO] Incremental load - from: {fromDate}, to: {toDate}")
        Else
            ' Full load - check if endpoint needs date variables
            If request.endpoint.Contains("{{from}}") OrElse request.endpoint.Contains("{{to}}") Then
                customVars("from") = fromDate
                customVars("to") = toDate
                BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[INFO] Full load with date range - from: {fromDate}, to: {toDate}")
            Else
                BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, "[INFO] Full load without date variables")
            End If
        End If
        
        ' Execute and populate table
        If customVars.Count > 0 Then
            request.PopulateTable(si, customVars)
        Else
            request.PopulateTable(si)
        End If
        
        BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[SUCCESS] Data loaded to table: {targetTable}")
        
        ' Update control table with new ReferenceDate
        If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(referenceColumn) Then
            Dim updateQuery As String = $"UPDATE XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL 
                                         SET ReferenceDate = '{toDate}' 
                                         WHERE EndPoint = '{requestName}'"
            BRApi.Database.ExecuteActionQuery(si, updateQuery, True)
            BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[INFO] Updated ReferenceDate to: {toDate}")
        End If
        
        Return $"SUCCESS: {requestName} executed and loaded to {targetTable}"
        
    Catch ex As Exception
        BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, $"[ERROR] ExecuteRestFastRequest failed: {ex.Message}")
        Throw
    End Try
End Function
notes: CRITICAL: Never initialize request.variables = New Dictionary() - this overwrites RestFast's predefined configuration
Always pass custom variables as parameter to PopulateTable(), not by modifying request.variables
Control table schema: LoadId, EndPoint, TargetTable, ReferenceDate, ReferenceColumn, Enable
If ReferenceColumn is empty, performs full load; if set, performs incremental load
RestFast request must be pre-configured with endpoint containing {{from}} and {{to}} placeholders
prerequisites: Target staging table created in database
RestFast request configured with OAuth, dataKey, columnMappings

integration_patterns.title: Control Table Setup for ETL Connector
integration_patterns.description: Database table structure to manage automated REST API loads with incremental date tracking
integration_patterns.sql:
CREATE TABLE XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL (
    LoadId INT PRIMARY KEY,
    EndPoint VARCHAR(255),      -- Nombre del request en RestFast
    TargetTable VARCHAR(255),   -- Tabla destino
    ReferenceDate VARCHAR(14),  -- Última fecha procesada (yyyyMMddHHmmss)
    ReferenceColumn VARCHAR(100), -- Columna de referencia para incremental
    Enable BIT                  -- 1 = activo, 0 = inactivo
)

-- Ejemplo de configuración
INSERT INTO XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL VALUES (
    1,
    'FIN_MIX_ONESTREAM',        -- Debe coincidir con nombre del request en RestFast
    'XFC_STG_FIN_MIX',
    '20251016150611',           -- Fecha inicial para cargar desde
    'CreatedDate',              -- Columna del API para filtrar incrementales
    1                           -- Habilitado
)
notes: EndPoint must match exactly the saved request name in RestFast dashboard
ReferenceDate is automatically updated after each successful load
Empty ReferenceDate defaults to beginning of current month
ReferenceColumn = NULL means full load every time
Enable = 0 to temporarily disable a load without deleting configuration

integration_patterns.title: Data Management Step Configuration
integration_patterns.description: How to configure the Data Management Step to execute the ETL connector
notes: Replace 'FIN_MIX_ONESTREAM' with your actual RestFast request name
Can create multiple steps for different endpoints
Schedule in Data Management Sequences for automation

common_issues.issue: Invalid URI: The hostname could not be parsed
common_issues.cause: request.variables was initialized with 'New Dictionary()', overwriting RestFast's predefined variables including pagination configuration
common_issues.solution: Never modify request.variables directly. Create a separate Dictionary and pass it as parameter to PopulateTable()
common_issues.code_example:
' ✅ CORRECT
Dim customVars As New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
customVars("from") = fromDate
customVars("to") = toDate
request.PopulateTable(si, customVars)

' ❌ INCORRECT - DO NOT DO THIS
If request.variables Is Nothing Then
    request.variables = New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
End If

common_issues.issue: Variables {{from}} and {{to}} not being replaced in endpoint
common_issues.cause: Variables not passed to PopulateTable() or Execute() methods
common_issues.solution: Always pass variables dictionary as parameter when using dynamic variables
common_issues.code_example:
Dim vars As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {{"from", "20251001000000"}, {"to", "20251116000000"}}
request.PopulateTable(si, vars)

common_issues.issue: Pagination stops after first page despite having more data
common_issues.cause: Invalid nextLink value extracted from JSON response (e.g., '<link>' instead of URL)
common_issues.solution: Validate nextLinkKey configuration in RestFast request. Add validation in UpdateVariables to check for valid URLs
common_issues.code_example:
' Validate nextLink before using
If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(nextLink) Then
    If nextLink.StartsWith("<") OrElse Not (nextLink.StartsWith("http://") OrElse nextLink.StartsWith("https://")) Then
        nextLink = Nothing  ' Invalid URL, stop pagination
    End If
End If

common_issues.cause: request.variables is Nothing and code tries to add to it without initializing
common_issues.solution: In RestFast UpdateVariables method, initialize variables if Nothing before merging
common_issues.code_example:
Private Function UpdateVariables(variables As Dictionary(Of String, String), paramVariables As Dictionary(Of String, String)) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
    If paramVariables Is Nothing Then Return variables
    
    ' Initialize if Nothing
    If variables Is Nothing Then
        variables = New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
    End If
    
    For Each paramVariable In paramVariables
        variables(paramVariable.Key) = paramVariable.Value
    Next
        
    Return variables
End Function

best_practices.description: Create a separate Dictionary for runtime variables and pass as parameter. Never modify request.variables directly.
best_practices.rationale: RestFast loads saved requests with predefined configuration (variables, pagination settings, OAuth). Overwriting these breaks the framework's functionality.

best_practices.description: Log at key points: before/after variable replacement, endpoint construction, HTTP calls, and pagination loops
best_practices.rationale: RestFast makes multiple HTTP calls (OAuth, main request, pagination). Detailed logs help identify which call is failing and why.

best_practices.description: Check that EndPoint name matches RestFast saved request name exactly (case-sensitive)
best_practices.rationale: GetSavedRequest() returns Nothing if name doesn't match, causing downstream errors.

best_practices.description: Implement default fromDate (e.g., beginning of month) when ReferenceDate is NULL
best_practices.rationale: Prevents accidental full historical loads that could timeout or overwhelm the API.

best_practices.practice: Test Request in RestFast Dashboard First
best_practices.description: Always test the request manually in RestFast dashboard before using in connector
best_practices.rationale: Validates endpoint, authentication, variable replacement, pagination, and column mappings work correctly.

best_practices.practice: Handle Both Full and Incremental Loads
best_practices.description: Check if ReferenceColumn is set to determine load type. Support endpoints with or without date variables.
best_practices.rationale: Provides flexibility for different data sources. Some APIs don't support date filtering.

troubleshooting_steps.action: Verify RestFast request works in dashboard
troubleshooting_steps.validation: Click 'Test Request' and verify response with correct data
Query XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL to ensure EndPoint, TargetTable, and Enable=1
SELECT * FROM [TargetTable] should work in SQL
Add BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage at each step to trace execution
Look for differences in variable values, endpoint URLs, HTTP status codes
Log endpoint before and after variable replacement to ensure {{from}}/{{to}} are replaced
Verify first HTTP call (to token endpoint) returns 200 OK with access_token
Verify nextLinkKey points to correct JSON path and returns valid URLs
